title: bidens subspiralis
intro: Bidens subspiralis, also known as the narrow-leaved beggar-ticks, is a species of flowering plant in the aster family that is native to eastern Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Bidens subspiralis include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and to aid in digestion. Bidens subspiralis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
